User action: Open source-linked summary of top concerns, timeline, repeat visits, red flags, abnormal/pending results and referral statuses.
System support: Rank signals by unresolved risk and freshness; show missing data checklist.
Patient voice protection: Patient quote and concern/fear remain visible but separate from assessment.

User action: Confirm what changed, what is worst, and whether prior explanations still fit.
System support: Repeat-visit reset and normal-test limitation prompts when appropriate.
Patient voice protection: Ask suggested questions based on patient-submitted concerns.

User action: Order labs/imaging/referrals with clinical question and owner.
System support: Abnormal-result ledger, imaging-scope warning, lab-trend view, unavailable-test alternative plan.
Patient voice protection: Explain why tests are ordered or why a normal test does not fully answer the concern.

User action: Send referral with clinical question, unresolved symptoms, prior tests and patient concern.
Patient voice protection: Patient can see referral state without interpreting rejection as diagnosis exclusion.

User action: Close each concern or mark unresolved with safety-net plan, owner and date.
System support: Pending-test discharge contract and overdue follow-up worklist.
Patient voice protection: Patient receives plain-language summary and correction/escalation path.

User action: Review active diagnostic episodes and trend changes.
System support: Show unresolved issue registry, personal baseline trends, repeat visits and patient status updates.
Patient voice protection: Persistent symptoms remain active rather than silently archived.
